description: CompositionBlue striped polo neck T-shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves, buttoned chest placket and embroidered brand name on the left hemFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach, soak or tumble dryDry in shadeCool iron, but do not iron on designBlue stripes add subtle styling to this polo neck T-shirt from adidas. The embroidered brand name on the left hem adds interesting detail, while the cotton blend fabric keeps you feeling comfortable on extended training sessions. Team this with tracks or training shorts.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5.6' and chest 32"
